message:
fix(a11y): add aria-label to stat block move-up button (#8907)

The icon-only move-up button in StatBlockFactoryModal had no
accessible name, leaving screen reader users without a label
for the reorder control. Add title + aria-label using a new
i18n key.

Addresses #8884

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1147,7 +1147,8 @@
       "blocksCount_other": "{{count}} blocks",
       "deleteStatBlock": "Delete stat block",
       "addAtLeastOne": "Add at least one stat block.",
-      "changeIcon": "Change icon"
+      "changeIcon": "Change icon",
+      "moveBlockUp": "Move stat block up"
     },
     "aiAssist": {
       "describeWhatYouWant": "AI Assist — describe what you want",
